headline: Seagate (STX) Expands HAMR With Hyperscalers: Is Mozaic 4+ the Margin Story Investors Missed?
summary: In early March 2026, Seagate Technology announced its Mozaic 4+ HAMR-based storage platform is now qualified and in volume production with two leading hyperscale cloud providers, supporting hard drive capacities up to 44TB and promising future scaling toward 10TB per disk and 100TB drives. This qualification milestone highlights how Seagate’s in-house laser and nanophotonic engineering, plus higher capacity per watt and per rack, could make its HAMR drives a core building block for AI-era...
